title: Anime Icons Xaero's
description: Adds Compatibility with Xaerp's Minimap for some Anime mods.
body:
Supports 1.16.5 to 1.21.1

Requirement: Xaero's minimap
The resourcepack is able to be used in any version of the mods that is supported although if there are new renamed mobs or new mobs, it won't be have an icon.
The current list of supported mods are the ones I play with the most but feel free to comment and suggest some anime mods to make Xaero's compatible with.
Feel free to comment if there are icons that are not bugged or not done. And if you want more anime mods to make compatible with Xaero's minimap.
Why are they all under one file? For me, it is better to manage this way and it won't have any effect on whether or not you download all of the mods or not.
Mods Supported:

You don't need all the mods listed here, it will work regardless.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- JujutsuCraft (v 49.1) (For JJC and it's other addons, check: JJC XAERO COMPAT)
- Mine Piece (v13)
- Kimetsu No Yaiba (v3)
- My Hero Craft (v29.0.1)
- Danny's AOT (v1.0.38)
- Tensura: Reincarnated (v2.0.0.3)
- Solo Levelling: Reawakening (v0.10.7.5)

</details>
